'''ngayapa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mmole|mmole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mmole|mmole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ngayapa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæyæpæth|ngæyæpæth]] || [[word:ngæyæpæj|ngæyæpæj]] || [[word:ngæyæpæsh|ngæyæpæsh]] || [[word:ngæyæpæ|ngæyæpæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayayapath|ngayayapath]] || [[word:ngayayapaj|ngayayapaj]] || [[word:ngayayapash|ngayayapash]] || [[word:ngayayapa|ngayayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayapath|ngayapath]] || [[word:ngayapaj|ngayapaj]] || [[word:ngayapash|ngayapash]] || [[word:ngayapa|ngayapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayafpath|ngayafpath]] || [[word:ngayafpaj|ngayafpaj]] || [[word:ngayafpash|ngayafpash]] || [[word:ngayafpaf|ngayafpaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngayapatha|ngayapatha]] || [[word:ngayapaja|ngayapaja]] || [[word:ngayapasha|ngayapasha]] || [[word:ngayapaka|ngayapaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngayapath|ngayapath]] || [[word:ngayapaj|ngayapaj]] || [[word:ngayapash|ngayapash]] || [[word:ngayapa|ngayapa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngayapathal|ngayapathal]] || [[word:ngayapajal|ngayapajal]] || [[word:ngayapashal|ngayapashal]] || [[word:ngayapakal|ngayapakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngayapathatha|ngayapathatha]] || [[word:ngayapajaja|ngayapajaja]] || [[word:ngayapashasha|ngayapashasha]] || [[word:ngayapaka|ngayapaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngayapathan|ngayapathan]] || [[word:ngayapajan|ngayapajan]] || [[word:ngayapashan|ngayapashan]] || [[word:ngayapakan|ngayapakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngayapathaoro|ngayapathaoro]] || [[word:ngayapajaoro|ngayapajaoro]] || [[word:ngayapashaoro|ngayapashaoro]] || [[word:ngayapakaoro|ngayapakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
